======= RMM02580Raymond Clark Hitchings papers2580Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Raymond Clark Hitchings papers
Hitchings, Raymond Clark, 1892-
2580
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1808-1959,-1870-1945 (bulk) Accounts, correspondence, financial and legal records, speeches, genealogical information, farm records, and other papers. Accounts, correspondence, and financial and legal records relating to Hitchings's various positions as an officer and employee of the Co-operative Grange League Federation Exchange (ca. 1920-1928) and as a consultant and officer in various agricultural agencies; also, other personal and family papers. Collection material in English 2083987
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
June 1969
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2004
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, January 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Agricultural consultant.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Accounts, correspondence, and financial and legal records relating to Hitchings's various positions as an officer and employee of the Co-operative Grange League Federation Exchange (ca. 1920-1928) and as a consultant and officer in various agricultural agencies; also, records (1930-1935) relating to Hitchings's tenure as a member and as president of the Board of Education of Onondaga Centralized School District #1, his correspondence with the Americanization League of Syracuse and Onondaga County (ca. 1923-1927), and speeches he gave before farm groups. Hitchings family papers include an autobiographical sketch; an unpublished manuscript by his brother, Harold Ramsdell Hitchings; a diary (1884) of his father, Grant G. Hitchings; genealogical information; and other items relating to the family farm at South Onondaga, New York, including general farm and orchard accounts (41 vols., 1808-1926), labor reports (2 vols., 1910-1911), and records of a sod mulch and cultivated orchard experiment (3 vols., 1904-1914).
Cite As:
Raymond Clark Hitchings papers, #2580. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Speeches. Genealogies. Diaries. Autobiographies. Accounts. Farmers. Orchards -- New York (State) Mulching. Farms. Agriculture -- New York (State) Hitchings, Grant G. Hitchings, Harold Ramsdell. Hitchings family. Americanization League of Syracuse and Onondaga County Cooperative Grange League Federation Exchange Onondaga Centralized School District #1
